project: Preset generique -- illustration digitale prestige, style roman graphique moderne
language_convention: FR pour les meta-descriptions et notes d'usage, EN pour les tokens injectables dans les prompts IA

critical: black ink outlines sharp uniform precise
style_weight.usage: En cas de conflit entre regles, la priorite descend de critical vers flexible. Un pipeline peut sacrifier les flexible mais jamais les critical.

options.wide: full scene visible, environment detail, architectural framing, used for establishing shots and group scenes
options.medium: subject with context, balanced framing, face and hands readable, used for character scenes and dialogue
options.close: tight framing, maximum detail on face or object, material rendering visible, used for emotional beats and detail showcase
options.icon: single object isolated, stylized simplification, used for spot illustrations and editorial icons

shot_type.usage: Injecter le shot_type apres le sujet et avant les style modifiers. Le medium shot est le cadrage naturel pour ce style.

style.positioning: Modern prestige graphic novel illustration, clean digital rendering with controlled volume, stylized realism that never crosses into photography

linework: black ink outlines on all major shapes
no bleeding, no feathering, no rough edges
outlines define form boundaries with clarity
consistent weight throughout, no hand-drawn variation
color: clean digital coloring with flat color areas as base layer
colors are confident and precise, never muddy
color fills stay within outlined boundaries
shading: soft controlled shadows and highlights for volume
smooth precise shading with no grainy paint texture
shadows are deliberate and localized, not atmospheric
highlights are sharp where needed (metal, glass) and soft on organic forms
no heavy dramatic lighting, no ambient occlusion overkill
shading suggests volume without simulating photography
materials: sharp reflections on metal surfaces, controlled and precise
precise fabric folds with clean shadow logic
smooth glass with faint controlled reflections
skin rendered with smooth controlled tones, no pores
materials are rendered with clarity but remain stylized
texture: no paper grain, no brush grain, no noise overlays
no watercolor bleeding, no oil paint texture
texture conveyed through shading logic not surface noise
depth_rules: no extreme lens distortion or fisheye
depth conveyed through overlapping, size, and controlled shadow

hierarchy: one clear focal subject or action
detail density highest on focal point, decreasing outward
secondary elements support but never compete
faces and hands are always priority rendering targets
composition.density: moderate to rich, controlled complexity, maximum 6-8 meaningful elements per scene
balance: considered composition with clear visual flow
negative space used intentionally, not accidentally
no visual clutter despite material detail

avoid: grainy paint textures and watercolor effects
rough sketch lines and hand-drawn imprecision
dramatic cinematic lighting (lens flare, god rays)
speech bubbles and text rendered in image
prompt_core: Clean digital illustration in a modern prestige graphic novel style, black ink outlines sharp uniform and precise, clean digital coloring with flat color areas and soft controlled shadows for volume, smooth precise shading, polished final render, details rendered with clarity and precision but stylized, professional clear polished atmosphere.
visual_signature: flat color base with soft controlled volume shading
sharp reflections on metal, precise fabric folds

modifiers.usage: Les 5 core modifiers sont injectes apres le sujet. Les optional et enrichment ajoutent une nuance selon le contexte.

characters.design: realistic proportions with stylized precision, expressive without caricature, polished and contemporary
characters.anatomy: accurate and believable, clearly illustrated not photographic, clean digital rendering
characters.expressions: nuanced and readable, subtle sophistication, conveyed through precise facial rendering
gestures: hands rendered with care and precision
accessories: rendered with material precision (metal, leather, fabric)

types: modern urban interiors with architectural detail
environment.density: moderate to rich, every element purposeful
rules: architecture rendered with precision and clean lines
environment detail decreases with distance from focal point
materials are identifiable (wood, metal, glass, concrete)
background supports mood without competing with subjects

color_policy.dominant: contextual, driven by scene mood and narrative
accents: any 5-7 color harmony with mature confidence
forbidden: pastel-only palettes (too soft for prestige tone)
contrast_rules: outlines ensure shape separation at any contrast level
value range from deep shadows to clean highlights
color temperature supports mood (warm = intimate, cool = formal)
accent colors used strategically for narrative focus

invariants: flat color base with controlled volume shading
smooth polished digital finish, no grain
no speech bubbles, no text in image
quality_checks: all shapes have clean sharp outlines
shading is smooth without grain or brush texture
faces and hands at highest detail priority

negative_short: photorealistic, 3D render, grainy paint texture, anime style, rough sketch lines, bleeding outlines, neon colors, speech bubbles, cluttered background, watercolor effects
negative_core: photorealistic, realistic texture, hyperrealism, 3D render, CGI aesthetic, grainy paint texture, watercolor effects, rough sketch lines, bleeding outlines, feathered edges, anime style, manga conventions, cartoon exaggeration, neon colors, oversaturated palette, speech bubbles, text in image, cluttered background, visual noise, excessive detail, skin pores, lens flare, god rays, dramatic cinematic lighting, film grain, noise overlays, brush texture, paper grain, muddy colors, distorted anatomy
negative_usage: negative_short (10 termes) pour Midjourney et moteurs avec limite de tokens. negative_core (29 termes) pour SDXL, Flux et moteurs sans contrainte de longueur.
aesthetic_references: Sean Murphy Batman White Knight linework

prompt_examples.character: [character description], clean digital illustration, prestige graphic novel style, sharp black ink outlines, flat color base with soft controlled shadows for volume, [expression], [color palette], polished atmosphere
prompt_examples.scene: [scene with characters], clean digital illustration, modern prestige graphic novel, sharp uniform outlines, smooth digital coloring with controlled volume, [composition], [color palette], professional polished finish
prompt_examples.environment: [setting description], clean digital illustration, prestige graphic novel style, sharp outlines, precise architectural rendering, material detail (metal, glass, wood), [color palette], controlled shadows, polished atmosphere
prompt_examples.portrait: [character portrait], close shot, clean digital illustration, prestige graphic novel, sharp ink outlines, smooth controlled shading on face, precise material rendering on clothing, [color palette], polished editorial quality
prompt_examples.action: [action scene], clean digital illustration, prestige graphic novel, sharp outlines, controlled dynamic composition, smooth shading with volume, [color palette], professional polished atmosphere

prompt_builder.template: [subject], [shot_type], [action or state], clean digital illustration, prestige graphic novel style, sharp black ink outlines uniform and precise, flat color base with soft controlled shadows for volume, smooth polished finish, [composition], [material focus], [color palette], [mood/atmosphere]
recommended_order: style core (digital illustration, graphic novel, ink outlines)
prompt_builder.usage_note: Sujet en premier, puis cadrage, puis action, puis contraintes de style. Le prompt_core est injecte en tete pour verrouiller le style prestige.

hero_portrait.description: single character portrait with material detail and controlled lighting
hero_portrait.composition: subject rule-of-thirds or centered, background simplified or contextual, face at highest detail
hero_portrait.variant: three-quarter view preferred for volume showcase

narrative_duo.description: two characters in interaction, balanced composition with narrative tension
narrative_duo.composition: balanced but asymmetric, clear sight lines between characters, depth via overlapping and shadow
narrative_duo.variant: medium shot, slight depth between planes

establishing_scene.description: environment-focused composition with or without characters, architectural precision
establishing_scene.composition: architectural lines guide the eye, material rendering showcased, characters secondary if present

dramatic_moment.description: single high-impact narrative beat with focused lighting and composition
dramatic_moment.composition: strong focal point, supporting elements frame the moment, shadow and light create tension
dramatic_moment.variant: medium or close shot, controlled dramatic angle

editorial_spread.description: rich scene balancing multiple elements for magazine or book interior
editorial_spread.composition: layered composition with clear reading path, multiple elements at varying detail levels, prestige finish

noir_moderne.description: high contrast, deep shadows, urban tension, sophisticated darkness
noir_moderne.material_focus: metal surfaces, wet streets, leather, glass reflections
noir_moderne.character_style: sharp features, controlled expressions, tension in posture

corporate_elegance.description: clean lines, restrained palette, institutional polish, authority
corporate_elegance.material_focus: polished wood, glass architecture, tailored fabric, brushed metal
corporate_elegance.character_style: dignified proportions, measured expressions, professional attire rendered with precision

aventure_contemporaine.description: dynamic but controlled, warm palette, narrative energy, modern adventure
aventure_contemporaine.material_focus: outdoor materials, weathered surfaces, natural textures stylized
aventure_contemporaine.character_style: active poses, expressive faces, practical clothing rendered with care

intimiste.description: soft warm tones, quiet moments, emotional depth, restrained beauty
intimiste.material_focus: soft fabrics, warm wood, candlelight, paper and books
intimiste.character_style: gentle expressions, relaxed postures, intimate proximity
